common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Returns a list of products that can be added to a targeted campaign

common_error_list.name: error_limit
common_error_list.description: The total API call number made by your APP has reached the daily API call limit, please try again after 00: 00 (UTC+08:00)

common_error_list.name: error_rate_limit
common_error_list.description: Too many requests. You have reached the rate limit. Please try again later.

common_error_list.name: source_ip_undeclared
common_error_list.description: Request Source IP ({ip}) is undeclared. Please declare all your IP addresses in the Shopee Open Platform Console > App list > IP Address Whitelist

common_error_list.name: error_param

request_params.description: Each result set is returned as a page of entries. Use the "page_size" filters to control the maximum number of entries to retrieve per page (i.e., per call). This integer value is used to specify the maximum number of entries to return in a single "page" of data. The limit of page_size if between 1 and 100.
request_params.name: page_size

request_params.description: Specifies the starting entry of data to return in the current call. Default is "" or not passed. If data is more than one page, the cursor can be some entry to start next call.
request_params.name: cursor

request_params.description:
Use this field to specify which field to use to sort the returned item list. Available values:
-sales: Sort by sales in descending order (default value)
sales: Sort by sales in ascending order
-stock: Sort by inventory in descending order
stock: Sort by inventory in ascending order
-price: Sort by price in descending order
price: Sort by price in ascending order
request_params.name: sort_by

request_params.description: Search type: ITEM_NAME or ITEM_ID, used with search_content.
request_params.name: search_type

request_params.description:
Search by item name or item ID, item_id should be split by comma and at most 50 items.

Please specify search_type for it to be effective, otherwise search_content will be ignored.
request_params.name: search_content

response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: error

response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message
response_params.sample: Please agree to the AMS T&C in Seller Center - Affiliate Marketing Solutions first before using Open API.

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

children.description: Is the current item in the blacklist.
children.name: is_in_blacklist

children.description: The total count of items that meet the query criteria.
children.name: total_count

children.description: Pass the content in the next request as cursor to get the next page data.
children.name: cursor

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/ams/get_targeted_campaign_addable_product_list?access_token=access_token&cursor=abcd&page_size=20&partner_id=partner_id&search_content=101%2C102&search_type=ITEM_ID&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&sort_by=-sales&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

value.message: Please agree to the AMS T&C in Seller Center - Affiliate Marketing Solutions first before using Open API.
